name: Accepted Prefixes Are Not All You Need: A Negative Result on PEFT-Based Block-Diffusion Drafting
summary: arXiv:2607.12422v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language model inference by using a cheap drafter to propose multiple future tokens and a target mode...
description: arXiv:2607.12422v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language model inference by using a cheap drafter to propose multiple future tokens and a target model to verify them. A common design goal is therefore to improve draft quality while reducing auxiliary parameters and systems overhead. We study a negative result for this direction through PEFT-BD, a...
author: Abdurrahman Javat, Allan Kazakov
